title: feat(play): add labels for play to inject into pods.
body:
Ref issues: #25185 and #26450
Adding flag --labels  to inject labels (similar to annotations) for pods in play.go, creating a `pkg/kube` for annotations and labels. Moving there the annotations/validations to also validate labels.

[EDIT] Added the labels to the kube generate command 
(this is other pod ID with labels l1=v1 and anns a1=b1)

```
> ❯ bin/podman kube generate nginx                                                           
# Save the output of this file and use kubectl create -f to import
# it into Kubernetes.
#
# Created with podman-6.0.0-dev
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  annotations:
    a1/nginx-nginx: b1
    io.kubernetes.cri-o.SandboxID/nginx-nginx: a0b9225acda4c2e07259d2fb584f2f4e8e54a4ffc6a0f28d56f89a4c60607c27
    io.podman.annotations.kube.health.check/nginx-nginx: "true"
    io.podman.annotations.userns: host
  creationTimestamp: "2026-02-15T08:05:37Z"
  labels:
    app: nginx
    l1: v1
  name: nginx
spec:
  containers:
  - image: docker.io/library/nginx:1.14.2
    name: nginx-nginx
  restartPolicy: Always

```

Please let me know your thoughts , thanks
